name: Beef Stroganoff
instructions:
1. Cut the beef into thin strips about 1cm thick, against the grain. Season with salt and pepper.

2. Heat sunflower oil in a large pan over high heat. Sear the beef in batches for 2-3 minutes per side until browned. Remove and set aside.

3. In the same pan, reduce heat to medium and melt the butter. Sauté the onion and mushrooms for 5-6 minutes until softened.

4. Sprinkle flour over the onion and mushrooms and stir well for 1 minute.

5. Gradually pour in the beef broth, stirring continuously until the sauce thickens.

6. Add the sour cream and mustard. Stir well and bring to a gentle simmer.

7. Return the beef to the pan along with any accumulated juices. Simmer for 5 minutes until the beef is tender and the sauce is creamy.

8. Serve over noodles or rice, garnished with fresh chopped parsley.
simpleInstructions:
1. Cut beef into strips and sear in oil. Set aside.

2. Sauté onion and mushrooms in butter.

3. Add flour, then gradually stir in broth.

4. Stir in sour cream and mustard.

5. Return beef and simmer 5 minutes.

6. Serve with noodles or rice and parsley.
